title: Sheepish's Origin Orbs
description: Additional origin orbs with custom recipes to allow for changing specific origin layers
body: ### Adds many different Origin Orbs for the many different layers which mods can add: - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) - [Origins: Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes) - [Origins: Elemental Alignment](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-elemental-alignment) - [Origins: Player Scale](https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-player-scale) - [Origin Deities](https://modrinth.com/mod/origin-deities) ### How to start? - Kill a boss mob - This will give you between 2-3 Orb Pieces (regardless of looting (v1.0)) - You need 4 of these along with a totem to start making the custom orbs - Craft a Broken Orb - Using a totem in the centre of the crafting grid and 4 Orb Pieces surrounding obtain a Broken Orb - Smelt the Broken Orb to obtain a Blank Orb! - Follow the recipes for specific orbs: ## Recipes
